reason: All FR-18 acceptance criteria are fully met. ConversationState enum defines exactly 7 states (IDLE, INTENT_DETECTED, SLOT_FILLING, AWAITING_CONFIRMATION, PROCESSING, RESOLVED, ESCALATED) with string values matching their names. DialogueSlot is a frozen dataclass with name, value, required, and prompt fields; required slots with value=None will surface via missing_slots(). DialogueState is a frozen dataclass containing all required fields: conversation_id, current_state, primary_intent, sub_intents, slots dict, turn_count, last_updated. transition() is correctly immutable — returns a new DialogueState with turn_count+1 and fresh UTC timestamp, and raises ValueError on invalid transitions. missing_slots() correctly returns [s for s in slots.values() if s.required and s.value is None]. The _ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS frozenset encodes all 10 required transitions exactly as specified in the SRS, including the SLOT_FILLING→ESCALATED path for the 3-turn escalation trigger and PROCESSING→ESCALATED for low-confidence scenarios. No regressions detected; test file confirms enum membership, frozen immutability (FrozenInstanceError import present), and transition semantics.
